title: CNBC: Anthropic is starting its own AI drug discovery program
friendlyTitle: Anthropic wants to use AI for drug discovery
summary: CNBC reported that Anthropic is launching an internal drug discovery program focused on neglected diseases alongside its Claude Science product for life sciences companies. Anthropic says doing its own drug-discovery work should help it build better AI tools for the industry, though many details remain open.
friendlySummary: CNBC says Anthropic is starting a program to look for treatments for neglected diseases while building Claude Science for researchers.
whyItMatters: The move shows frontier AI labs pushing beyond software into domain-specific scientific workflows and possibly real R&D pipelines. For users, it is a sign that the next phase of AI products may be shaped by firsthand use in regulated, high-stakes fields rather than generic chat alone.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This shows AI companies trying to help with real scientific problems, though medicine still requires careful testing and many years of work.
